title: Ivy and the Magic Classroom
synopsis: When young Ivy discovers her new classroom is filled with magical surprises, she learns that school can be the most wonderful adventure of all. From talking animals to enchanted supplies, Ivy's first day becomes a fairy-tale come true.

pages.text: Ivy woke up with butterflies dancing in her tummy. Today was her very first day of school! She put on her favorite yellow dress and brushed her hair until it shined. Mama packed her lunch in a special box with stars on it. 'Are you ready for your big adventure?' asked Mama. Ivy nodded, but she felt a little scared too. What if school was different from what she imagined?

illustration.description: A girl with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes wearing a yellow dress, standing by her bedroom window in the morning light, drawn in chalkboard style on dark green board with white and colored chalk, dusty texture, hand-drawn on board
illustration.alt: Ivy getting ready for her first day of school

pages.text: When they arrived at Willowbrook Elementary, Ivy saw a big red building with bright windows. Children were walking in with their parents, carrying backpacks and lunchboxes. Some kids looked happy and excited. Others looked nervous, just like Ivy felt. 'Remember,' said Mama, giving her a hug, 'if you need anything, just ask your teacher, Mrs. Rose.' Ivy took a deep breath and walked toward the school doors.

illustration.description: A girl with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes holding her mother's hand in front of a red brick school building, other children walking nearby, drawn in chalkboard style on dark green board with white and colored chalk, equations doodles, school themed, artistic warm, dusty texture, hand-drawn on board
illustration.alt: Ivy arriving at school with her mother

pages.text: Room 12 had a wooden door with a rainbow painted on it. Inside, Ivy found colorful desks arranged in a circle and walls covered with pictures of animals and letters. Mrs. Rose had kind eyes and a warm smile. 'Welcome, Ivy!' she said. 'Your seat is right here by the reading corner.' As Ivy sat down, she noticed something strange. The classroom bunny winked at her! And did that pencil just wiggle by itself?

illustration.description: A girl with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes sitting at a colorful desk in a classroom with a friendly teacher, a bunny in a cage winking, and animated school supplies, drawn in chalkboard style on dark green board with white and colored chalk, equations doodles, school themed, artistic warm, dusty texture, hand-drawn on board

pages.text: During circle time, Mrs. Rose began reading a story about a brave little mouse. Suddenly, the book's pages started glowing with soft golden light! The other children didn't seem to notice, but Ivy could see tiny sparkles floating in the air. The classroom bunny hopped out of his cage and sat right next to her. 'Hello, Ivy,' whispered the bunny. 'Welcome to our magical classroom!' Ivy's eyes grew wide with wonder.

illustration.description: A girl with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes sitting in a circle with other children, a glowing storybook in the center, a talking bunny beside her, sparkles floating in the air, drawn in chalkboard style on dark green board with white and colored chalk, equations doodles, school themed, artistic warm, dusty texture, hand-drawn on board
illustration.alt: The magical story time with glowing book and talking bunny

pages.text: At art time, Ivy picked up a paintbrush that felt warm in her hand. As she dipped it in blue paint, the brush began painting beautiful butterflies all by itself! The crayons started coloring rainbows, and the scissors cut out perfect paper snowflakes without any help. 'The art supplies like you,' whispered a friendly crayon. 'They can tell you have a kind heart.' Ivy giggled as her paper filled with the most beautiful pictures she had ever seen.

illustration.description: A girl with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes at an art table with magical paintbrushes painting butterflies by themselves, animated crayons drawing rainbows, scissors cutting paper, all drawn in chalkboard style on dark green board with white and colored chalk, equations doodles, school themed, artistic warm, dusty texture, hand-drawn on board
illustration.alt: Ivy creating art with magical supplies

pages.text: During math time, the numbers on the board started dancing! The number 2 did a little twirl, and the number 5 jumped up and down. When Ivy counted the toy bears, they stood up and bowed to her one by one. 'One, two, three!' she counted, and each bear took a little bow. Even the addition problems seemed easier when the numbers were so friendly and playful. Learning was turning out to be much more fun than Ivy had ever imagined!

illustration.description: A girl with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes at her desk with dancing numbers on the chalkboard behind her, toy bears bowing, animated math equations, drawn in chalkboard style on dark green board with white and colored chalk, equations doodles, school themed, artistic warm, dusty texture, hand-drawn on board
illustration.alt: Ivy learning math with dancing numbers and bowing toy bears

pages.text: As the school day came to an end, Ivy felt sad to leave her new magical friends. The classroom bunny hopped over to her desk. 'Don't worry,' he said softly. 'The magic will be here every day, waiting for you. School is always an adventure when you keep your heart open to wonder.' Mrs. Rose gave each student a special bookmark shaped like a star. Ivy's bookmark sparkled just a little bit more than the others.

illustration.description: A girl with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes saying goodbye to the classroom bunny, holding a sparkling star-shaped bookmark, Mrs. Rose in the background, classroom supplies waving goodbye, drawn in chalkboard style on dark green board with white and colored chalk, equations doodles, school themed, artistic warm, dusty texture, hand-drawn on board
illustration.alt: Ivy saying goodbye to her magical classroom friends

pages.text: When Mama picked her up, Ivy was bubbling with excitement. 'How was your first day?' asked Mama. 'It was magical!' said Ivy, hugging her star bookmark tight. She couldn't wait to tell Mama about all her wonderful adventures, but she decided to keep the classroom's special secret. Tomorrow couldn't come soon enough! As they walked to the car, Ivy looked back at Room 12 and saw the bunny waving from the window. School was going to be the best adventure ever.

illustration.description: A girl with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes walking hand-in-hand with her mother away from school, looking back at a classroom window where a bunny waves goodbye, holding her star bookmark, drawn in chalkboard style on dark green board with white and colored chalk, equations doodles, school themed, artistic warm, dusty texture, hand-drawn on board
illustration.alt: Ivy leaving school excitedly with her mother

questions.question: How did Ivy feel on her first day of school?
questions.explanation: Ivy felt butterflies in her tummy and was both scared and excited about her first day of school.

questions.question: What was the first magical thing Ivy noticed in the classroom?
questions.explanation: The first magical thing Ivy noticed was the classroom bunny winking at her when she sat down.

questions.question: What happened during art time?
questions.explanation: During art time, Ivy's paintbrush began painting beautiful butterflies all by itself.

questions.question: What did Mrs. Rose give each student at the end of the day?
questions.explanation: Mrs. Rose gave each student a special bookmark shaped like a star, and Ivy's sparkled a little more than the others.

questions.question: How did Ivy feel about going back to school?
choices: she didn't want to go back
questions.explanation: Ivy was so excited about her magical day that she couldn't wait to go back to school the next day.
